common.linkNotReliable: This link might be a hallucination from AI model and may not be reliable.

messageInput.placeholder: Ask a research question or describe what you want to investigate.
messageInput.placeholderWithRag:
Ask a research question.
Use @ to reference uploaded papers, notes, or research materials.

hero.title: Research Topics
hero.subtitle: with Evidence
hero.description: Meet ScholarFlow, a multi-agent research system for topic discovery and academic reports. It proposes candidate research directions, retrieves evidence from local materials, arXiv, OpenAlex, and optional web sources, then generates reports you can evaluate and edit.
hero.footnote: * ScholarFlow focuses on topic discovery, evidence retrieval, report writing, quality evaluation, and editing workflows.

settings.title: ScholarFlow Settings
settings.description: Manage your ScholarFlow research workflow settings here.
settings.mcpConfigDescription: ScholarFlow uses the standard JSON MCP config to create a new server.
settings.pasteConfigBelow: Paste your config below and click "Add" to add new servers.

rag.title: Academic Materials
rag.description: Manage your research materials here. Upload Markdown, text, or text-based PDF files such as papers, notes, and course materials for retrieval.
rag.noResources: No academic materials found. Upload a file to get started.

general.title: General
general.maxClarificationRoundsDescription: Maximum number of clarification rounds when clarification is enabled (default: 3).
general.maxPlanIterationsDescription: Set to 1 for single-step planning. Set to 2 or more to enable re-planning.
general.maxStepsOfPlan: Max steps of a research plan
general.maxStepsDescription: By default, each research plan has 3 steps.
general.maxSearchResultsDescription: By default, each search step has 3 results.
general.enableWebSearchDescription: When disabled, only local RAG knowledge base will be used. Useful for environments without internet access.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: The Model Context Protocol can extend ScholarFlow with external academic tools, private knowledge sources, browsers, and custom services. Click here to
mcp.editServerNote: Update the server configuration in JSON format

reportStyle.chooseDesc: Select the writing style for your research reports. Different styles are optimized for different audiences and purposes.
reportStyle.academicDesc: Formal, objective, and analytical with precise terminology
reportStyle.popularScienceDesc: Engaging and accessible for general audience
reportStyle.newsDesc: Factual, concise, and impartial journalistic style
reportStyle.strategicInvestmentDesc: Deep, comprehensive analysis for strategic investment institutions with actionable insights

footer.quote: Plan research, retrieve evidence, write grounded reports.

welcome.description: Welcome to 📚 ScholarFlow, a research agent system for topic discovery, academic search, report writing, evaluation, and editing.

conversationStarters: Generate three feasible research topic directions about AI-assisted high school math learning.
Review recent research on LLM-assisted programming and recommend topic ideas.
Based on my uploaded papers, suggest several undergraduate thesis directions.
Investigate multi-agent academic assistants and produce a structured report.

deepThinkingTooltip.title: Deep Thinking Mode: {status}
deepThinkingTooltip.description: When enabled, ScholarFlow will use reasoning model ({model}) to generate more thoughtful research plans.

researchModeTooltip.title: Research Mode: {status}
researchModeTooltip.description: When enabled, ScholarFlow will create a research plan, retrieve evidence, and generate a structured report. When disabled, it responds as a normal chat assistant.

investigationTooltip.title: Investigation Mode: {status}
investigationTooltip.description: Only applies in Research Mode. When enabled, ScholarFlow will perform a quick background search before planning. This is useful for academic topics that need recent context.

research.errorExecutingCode: Error when executing the above code
research.errorGeneratingPodcast: Error when generating podcast. Please try again.

evaluation.title: Report Quality Evaluation
evaluation.description: Evaluate your report using automated metrics and AI analysis.

messages.replayDescription: ScholarFlow is now replaying the conversation...
messages.replayModeDescription: You are now in ScholarFlow replay mode. Click the "Play" button on the right to start.
messages.demoNotice: * This site is for demo purposes only. If you want to try your own question, please
messages.cloneLocally: to clone it locally and run it.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.description: See ScholarFlow research workflows through replays.

cases.title: Generate topic ideas for AI in education
cases.description: The workflow compares candidate topics by research value, feasibility, novelty, and evidence availability.

cases.title: Investigate recent LLM-assisted programming research
cases.description: The report combines arXiv, OpenAlex, and web evidence to summarize representative papers, trends, and research gaps.

cases.title: Recommend thesis directions from uploaded papers
cases.description: The research prioritizes local papers as evidence and produces candidate directions, research questions, and implementation paths.

cases.title: Evaluate and improve an academic research report
cases.description: ScholarFlow checks sections, citations, and source coverage, then supports further editing and expansion in the editor.

coreFeatures.title: Core Features
coreFeatures.description: Find out what makes ScholarFlow useful for academic research.

features.name: Topic Direction Generation
features.description: Start from a broad interest and compare candidate topics by research value, feasibility, novelty, and evidence plan.

features.name: Academic Evidence Retrieval
features.description: Combine local materials, arXiv, OpenAlex, and optional web search into traceable research observations.

features.name: Human-guided Planning
features.description: Review and refine the research plan before execution so topic selection and search strategy stay controllable.

features.name: Report Evaluation and Editing
features.description: Evaluate generated reports with metrics, then continue polishing, rewriting, expanding, and adding images in the editor.

features.name: TypeScript Agent Engineering
features.description: Build observable and extensible academic workflows with Fastify, LangGraph, and Next.js.

multiAgent.title: ScholarFlow Workflow
multiAgent.description: Experience agent teamwork across topic discovery, academic search, evidence synthesis, report evaluation, and editing.

joinCommunity.title: Build ScholarFlow
joinCommunity.description: Contribute to a TypeScript academic Research Agent focused on controllable, evidence-aware workflows.
